Our services

What we clean

Tailored cleaning solutions for homes,businesses,offices,and post-construction sites.

Homes

Residential Cleaning

We bring freshness and comfort back to your home — every surface,corner,and room handled with care and consistency.

  • Living rooms,bedrooms &hallways
  • Kitchen deep-clean &sanitisation
  • Bathroom scrub &disinfection
  • Dusting,vacuuming &mopping
Book a session →
Offices &Shops

Commercial Cleaning

A spotless workspace impresses clients and keeps your team at their best. We work around your schedule — evenings or weekends included.

  • Retail floors &fitting rooms
  • Washrooms &kitchenettes
  • Entrance &reception areas
  • Regular or one-off contracts
Request a quote →
Workspace

Office Cleaning

A clean office boosts productivity. We handle daily or weekly cleans so your team can focus on what matters.

  • Desks,screens &keyboards
  • Kitchen &break room
  • Meeting rooms &boardrooms
  • Bins emptied &surfaces sanitised
Schedule now →
After Building

Post-Construction Cleaning

Renovation dust and builder debris removed thoroughly — so your new space is gleaming and truly move-in ready.

  • Dust removal from all surfaces
  • Paint splatters &adhesive residue
  • Debris sweep &disposal
  • Window &floor polish
Get a quote →
